live_migration_support_notes: Use WAL/msgstream/replicate events when available; otherwise proxy observation plus sealed segment checkpoints is required.
initial_snapshot_or_seed: backup/export of collection, partition, index, and segment metadata
delta_feed_or_change_capture: WAL/msgstream/replicate events when available, ordered by channel/segment/checkpoint
proxy_method: Milvus API proxy with collection/partition/index readiness routing
alternate_or_fallback: insert/query proxy observation plus sealed segment checkpoints when no deterministic stream exists
required_cutover_barrier: flush/segment seal complete; msgstream checkpoint drained; index build state and vector counts/search samples verified
parser_worker_scope: parse donor migration commands/wire/API messages; classify route; render donor diagnostics; no execution/finality authority
sbup_role_a_scope: trusted Role A bridge/proxy/source connector after engine admission; normalizes source events to DonorLiveIngestEventRecord; invokes admitted SBLR/internal procedures only
engine_mga_rule: destination ScratchBird MGA owns target commit visibility rollback recovery cutover evidence; donor feed tokens are evidence only
proof_tests: project/tests donor regression original baseline emulation steady-state active live-migration proxy mirror crash-restart idempotent replay rollback cutover performance and support bundle proofs
